channel.title: Certificate-Authority on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Certificate-Authority on Pi Stack

item.title: EJBCA vs Dogtag PKI vs OpenXPKI: Self-Hosted Enterprise CA Guide 2026
item.description: Running your own certificate authority (CA) is essential for organizations that need full control over certificate issuance, lifecycle management, and cryptographic policy enforcement. While lightweight tools like smallstep CA work well for SSH certificates and web-scale TLS automation, enterprise environments demand more: certificate enrollment workflows, hardware security module (HSM) integration, compliance reporting, and granular policy control.
